name: Administrative Units with assigned Tier Zero principals
description: Show Administrative Units that have assigned Tier Zero principals.

name: PAWs used by Tier Zero principals
description: Show Privileged Access Workstation devices used by Tier Zero principals.

name: Role Assignments that can wipe Intune devices
description: Display Intune role assignments with permissions to wipe company data from Intune-managed devices. Includes returning the assigned groups & principals and scopes.
query:
MATCH p1=(principal)-[:AZMemberOf*1..]->(:AZGroup)-[:EO_HasIntuneRoleAssignment]->(roleAssignment:EO_IntuneRoleAssignment)
WHERE any(action IN roleAssignment.matchedactions WHERE action IN [
        'Microsoft.Intune/RemoteTasks/Wipe',
        'Microsoft.Intune/RemoteTasks/Retire',
        'Microsoft.Intune/RemoteTasks/CleanPC',
        'Microsoft.Intune/ManagedDevices/Delete'
      ])
OPTIONAL MATCH p2=(roleAssignment)-[:EO_ScopedTo]->(scope)
RETURN p1,p2
LIMIT 1000

name: Principals sponsoring a Tier Zero principal
description: Show principals that sponsor Tier Zero principals.
query:
// EntraOps Classification: Tier Zero
MATCH p=(tierzero:Tag_Tier_Zero)-[:EO_IsSponsoredBy]->(principal)
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000

name: Nested role assignments
description: Show role assignments granted to nested groups.

name: PIM-for-Groups edges
description: Show AZMemberOf edges that are assigned via PIM-for-Groups.
query:
MATCH p=()-[r:AZMemberOf]->(:AZGroup)
WHERE r.pimassignmenttype IS NOT NULL
RETURN p
